name: Scapia Federal Credit Card
exclusions: ineligible transactions as per Scapia and Federal Bank terms
RuPay rewards apply on eligible UPI, online and offline spends of Rs 500 or more
milestoneBenefits: Unlimited domestic lounge and airport privileges unlock on meeting monthly spend criteria
additionalBenefits: Zero joining fee and zero annual fee
Zero forex markup on international transactions
10% Scapia coins on eligible online and offline spends on Visa
5% Scapia coins on eligible UPI, online and offline spends of Rs 500 or more on RuPay
Instant redemption on flights, hotels and buses on the Scapia app
Unlimited domestic lounge access after spending Rs 20,000 in the preceding month
Card controls and repayments managed through the Scapia app
